scripts.release: pnpm exec bumpp package.json packages/core/package.json packages/ui-vue/package.json packages/vite-plugin-agentation-vue/package.json mcp/package.json --all --git-check --commit "release: v%s" --tag "v%s" --push
scripts.release:patch: pnpm exec bumpp package.json packages/core/package.json packages/ui-vue/package.json packages/vite-plugin-agentation-vue/package.json mcp/package.json --all --git-check --commit "release: v%s" --tag "v%s" --push --release patch --yes
scripts.release:minor: pnpm exec bumpp package.json packages/core/package.json packages/ui-vue/package.json packages/vite-plugin-agentation-vue/package.json mcp/package.json --all --git-check --commit "release: v%s" --tag "v%s" --push --release minor --yes
scripts.release:major: pnpm exec bumpp package.json packages/core/package.json packages/ui-vue/package.json packages/vite-plugin-agentation-vue/package.json mcp/package.json --all --git-check --commit "release: v%s" --tag "v%s" --push --release major --yes
